description_long: This kiosk features a sleek, modern design with a semi-circular footprint and a prominent glass-paneled roof that allows natural light to flood the interior. The front is open, inviting entry, and is flanked by two potted plants, enhancing its welcoming appearance. Inside, the kiosk is equipped with a counter, shelving units, and various electronic devices, suggesting it is set up for retail or information services. The exterior is primarily finished in black with glossy and matte surfaces, and the structure appears to be constructed from metal and glass panels. The roof is gently arched, providing both aesthetic appeal and practical weather protection. No visible signage is present, and the overall style is distinctly contemporary with minimalist influences.
description: A modern, semi-circular kiosk with a glass-paneled arched roof, open front entry, and sleek black exterior, featuring interior counters and shelving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entry, interior counters, shelving, and electronic devices, with potted plants on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved glass roof, solid black side panels, and one potted plant near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back wall, glass roof, and both potted plants flanking the open entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panels, glass roof, and a potted plant near the entrance.
attribute_window_presence: multiple windows, located on roof and all sides, rectangular shape
attribute_roof_design: arched, semi-circular glass roof with metal framing, no overhangs or decorative elements
